---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
<!-- Provide a clear, concise title for the feature request -->

## Motivation
<!-- Explain why this feature is needed. What problem does it solve? Who benefits from it? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working. Include any relevant design details or mockups if applicable. -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- List specific, measurable criteria that define when this feature is complete. Use checkboxes. -->
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Implementation Hints
<!-- (Optional) Provide suggestions for how to implement this feature, including relevant code patterns or architectural considerations. -->

## Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues or pull requests using #issue_number -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or examples that help clarify the feature request. -->
